remember: Students will be able to recall the meaning and types of partnership
Students will be able to identify and explain the characteristics of partnership
Students will be able to describe the features of a registered partnership
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of partnership deed
Students will be able to explain the difference between general and limited partnership
Students will be able to describe the role of the Registrar of Firms
apply: Students will be able to apply the concept of partnership to real-life situations
Students will be able to calculate the capital and profit-sharing ratio
Students will be able to prepare a partnership deed
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the advantages and disadvantages of a partnership firm
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of partnership on business operations
Students will be able to compare the characteristics of partnership and company

ncert_objectives: Explain the meaning and types of partnership
Describe the characteristics of partnership and the features of a registered partnership
Explain the concept of partnership deed and the difference between general and limited partnership
board_exam_objectives: Explain the meaning and types of partnership, characteristics, and features of a registered partnership
Analyze the advantages and disadvantages of a partnership firm
